opinion.h4: CEPERO v. PUERTO RICO ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 1336, Misc. Decided June 18, 1962.
opinion.p: MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
opinion.h4: KANSAS CITY SOUTHERN RAILWAY CO. v. REILY, (1962)
opinion.p: KANSAS CITY SOUTHERN RAILWAY CO. v. REILY, COLLECTOR OF REVENUE OF LOUISIANA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF LOUISIANA. No. 918. Decided June 18, 1962.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
W. Scott Wilkinson, Milton W. Schober and Pike Hall, Jr. for appellant.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question. See National Leather Co. v. Massachusetts, 277 U.S. 413.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
